caribbean.headline: Heavy Rain Around Martinique, Roatan Winds Increase
caribbean.paragraph: Martinique is experiencing easterly winds near 12 kt, seas about 2.7 ft with a SE swell near a 7 s period, and an 88% rain probability that will bring heavy showers and brief squalls impacting Fort-de-France and nearby ports. I advise port operators to secure lines and prepare for reduced visibility in downpours; Roatan will see gustier conditions to 21 kt with choppier seas, so mariners there should monitor updates closely.

mediterranean.headline: Choppy Seas Near Mykonos as NNE Winds Reach 20 kt
mediterranean.paragraph: Mykonos is experiencing NNE winds of 20 kt with 5.1 ft seas, a 6 s dominant swell and less than 10% rain probability. I note Marseille is a close runner-up with 19 kt winds and similar short-period chop, and I advise small-vessel operators to expect uncomfortable conditions in exposed anchorages.
